_comment: Rout-effect visuals (#72). Visible in any battle as units break, so this reuses the bundled showcase battle — when a unit routs, a translucent team-tinted ripple flashes at its position and expands+fades over the radius (140px) where it shakes friendly morale. Purely cosmetic (spawned on the sim tick, faded on render time); no sim/replay/determinism impact.
caption: Rout-effect visuals (#72): when a unit routs, a translucent team-tinted shockwave now flashes at its position and expands+fades across the radius where its rout shakes nearby allies' morale (a soft centre-dense gradient). Previously the morale contagion was invisible. Purely cosmetic: no sim/replay impact.
